questions.q: In which year was the classic Indian fantasy film Mayabazar first released?
questions.explanation: Mayabazar was released in 1957.

questions.q: Who directed the 1957 mythological film Mayabazar?
questions.explanation: Mayabazar was directed by K. V. Reddy.

questions.q: Which Indian epic provides the source story for the 1957 film Mayabazar?
questions.explanation: Mayabazar is drawn from a sub-tale of the Mahabharata.

questions.q: Which legendary actor played Lord Krishna in the 1957 film Mayabazar?
questions.explanation: N. T. Rama Rao portrayed Krishna in Mayabazar.

questions.q: Which actor played the towering character Ghatotkacha in the 1957 film Mayabazar?
questions.explanation: S. V. Ranga Rao played the demon prince Ghatotkacha in Mayabazar.

questions.q: In how many languages was the film Mayabazar simultaneously produced in 1957?
questions.explanation: Mayabazar was made simultaneously in Telugu and Tamil.

questions.q: Besides Telugu, in which other South Indian language was the 1957 film Mayabazar simultaneously produced?
questions.explanation: Mayabazar was made simultaneously in Telugu and Tamil.

questions.q: Which celebrated comic song featuring an enormous wedding feast appears in the 1957 film Mayabazar?
questions.explanation: The famous feast song in Mayabazar is 'Vivaha Bhojanambu'.

questions.q: The 1957 film Mayabazar is especially celebrated in Indian cinema for which technical achievement?
options: Its trick photography and special effects
Its early use of synchronized stereo sound
questions.explanation: Mayabazar is renowned for its pioneering trick photography and special effects.

questions.q: Which composer is credited with the acclaimed music of the 1957 film Mayabazar?
questions.explanation: Ghantasala composed the music for Mayabazar.

questions.q: Which production company produced the 1957 film Mayabazar?
questions.explanation: Mayabazar was produced by Vijaya Vauhini Studios (Vijaya Productions).

questions.q: Which actress played Sasirekha (Vatsala), the heroine, in the Telugu version of the 1957 film Mayabazar?
questions.explanation: Savitri played the heroine Sasirekha in the Telugu version of Mayabazar.

questions.q: Which actor played Abhimanyu, the hero who loves Sasirekha, in the 1957 film Mayabazar?
questions.explanation: Akkineni Nageswara Rao played Abhimanyu in Mayabazar.

questions.q: In the 1957 film Mayabazar, which famous proper noun is associated with the magical illusionary marketplace created by Ghatotkacha?
questions.explanation: The title Mayabazar refers to the illusionary or magical bazaar central to the plot.

questions.q: The character Ghatotkacha in the 1957 film Mayabazar is, within the Mahabharata, the son of which Pandava?
questions.explanation: Ghatotkacha is the son of Bhima and the demoness Hidimbi in the Mahabharata.

questions.q: Which comic actor played the memorable role of Sakuni in the 1957 film Mayabazar?
questions.explanation: C. S. R. Anjaneyulu played the scheming Sakuni in Mayabazar.

questions.q: The romantic song 'Lahiri Lahiri Lahirilo' in the 1957 film Mayabazar is notable for depicting which setting?
options: Moonlight on a lake or river
questions.explanation: 'Lahiri Lahiri Lahirilo' is famed for its moonlit boat sequence, an early Indian use of an artificial moonlight effect.

questions.q: Which playback singer's voice is most associated with the songs of Krishna in the 1957 film Mayabazar, also being its music director?
questions.explanation: Ghantasala, the film's music director, also lent his voice to several of its songs.

questions.q: K. V. Reddy, director of the 1957 film Mayabazar, was also known for directing which earlier acclaimed Telugu fantasy?
questions.explanation: K. V. Reddy also directed the hit fantasy Patala Bhairavi (1951).

questions.q: In which year was a fully colourized digital version of the 1957 film Mayabazar released in theatres?
questions.explanation: A digitally remastered and colourized version of Mayabazar was released in 2010.

questions.q: The 1957 film Mayabazar centres on a marriage that the elders try to block. Whom do the Kauravas want Sasirekha to marry instead of Abhimanyu?
questions.explanation: The plot turns on the Kauravas arranging Sasirekha's marriage to Lakshmana Kumara, Duryodhana's son.

questions.q: Who is credited as the cinematographer of the 1957 film Mayabazar, responsible for its acclaimed trick photography?
questions.explanation: Marcus Bartley was the cinematographer of Mayabazar.

questions.q: Although the 1957 film Mayabazar was made with a partly different cast in Tamil, which actor played Ghatotkacha in both the Telugu and Tamil versions?
questions.explanation: S. V. Ranga Rao played Ghatotkacha in both the Telugu and Tamil versions of Mayabazar.

questions.q: In the Tamil version of the 1957 film Mayabazar, which actor played the hero Abhimanyu in place of Akkineni Nageswara Rao?
questions.explanation: Gemini Ganesan played Abhimanyu in the Tamil version of Mayabazar.

questions.q: The 1957 film Mayabazar drew on a folk theatre tradition, with its story commonly known in performing arts as which episode?
questions.explanation: The story is popularly known as 'Sasirekha Parinayam' (the marriage of Sasirekha).

questions.q: Before Ghantasala took over as music director of the 1957 film Mayabazar, which composer had begun the score and written a few songs such as 'Lahiri Lahiri' before leaving the project?
questions.explanation: Saluri Rajeswara Rao initially composed a few songs for Mayabazar, including 'Lahiri Lahiri', before leaving; Ghantasala completed and is credited with the score.

questions.q: In a 2013 poll conducted by a major film portal to mark 100 years of Indian cinema, the 1957 film Mayabazar received which distinction?
options: It was excluded from the list
It won only a regional award
It was voted the greatest Indian film of all time
questions.explanation: In a 2013 CNN-News18 (IBNLive) poll, Mayabazar was voted the greatest Indian film of all time.

questions.q: Which actress played Hidimbi, the mother of Ghatotkacha, in the Telugu version of the 1957 film Mayabazar?
questions.explanation: Suryakantham played Hidimbi, the mother of Ghatotkacha, in the Telugu version of Mayabazar.

questions.q: The 1957 film Mayabazar was produced under the banner of the Nagi Reddy and Chakrapani partnership, who founded which famous studio?
questions.explanation: B. Nagi Reddy and Chakrapani founded Vijaya Productions, which made Mayabazar.

questions.q: The famous line 'Evaru puttincharu ee maatalanu' and other witty dialogues of the 1957 film Mayabazar are credited largely to which writer associated with Vijaya Productions?
questions.explanation: Pingali Nagendrarao wrote the celebrated dialogues and lyrics of Mayabazar.
